name: floramind-ai-landing
description: A premium futuristic AI landing experience for FloraMind AI

scripts.build: vite build && xcopy /I /Y assets\js\index.js dist\assets\js\ && xcopy /I /Y manifest.json dist\ && xcopy /I /Y sw.js dist\ && if exist assets\icons\ xcopy /I /Y /E assets\icons dist\assets\icons\
